summary:
POLITICAL LANDSCAPE AND ELECTORAL VISIONS: Brandon describes a vision regarding the 2024 political landscape, detailing specific shifts across various states. Brandon observed a wave of individuals wearing shiny red shirts and hats featuring white MAGA lettering and stars, originating in Michigan, Minnesota, and Ohio. This movement expanded southward into Iowa, Nebraska, and Kansas. In Oklahoma, Brandon noted transparent embers catching fire and spreading torches over the state, reaching slightly into the North Dallas-Fort Worth area of Texas. Brandon categorizes several states by color, noting Oregon, Washington, California, Hawaii, Nevada, and Colorado as blue. Conversely, Alaska, New Mexico, Utah, Wyoming, Montana, Idaho, and Texas appeared red. Brandon highlights trouble or anomalies in Arizona, which appeared blue but was overlaid with a deeper crimson red, and Georgia, which was predominantly red with blue spots.

VISIONS CONCERNING DONALD TRUMP: Brandon details a vision of Donald Trump undergoing a period of intense pressure, describing him as being on a potter's wheel and passing through a refiner's fire. Brandon recounts seeing Trump on one knee, weeping, wearing a blue suit, a white shirt, and a red tie in a prayer stance. In this vision, Jesus Christ placed a hand on Trump's head, surrounded by a glowing light. Brandon states that Trump receives divine wisdom, compared to Solomon, to mend and fix a destroyed nation, though Brandon explicitly clarifies that this does not confirm Trump will win the presidency.

NATIONAL CRISES AND TIMELINE: Brandon reports seeing a massive influx of tens of millions of people from around the world attempting to cross the southern border simultaneously during 2024. Concurrently, Brandon describes an economic depression where the dollar is devalued to fifty cents, leading figures like George Soros and Klaus Schwab to believe the nation is completely destroyed. Brandon provides a specific timeline, noting that 2025 will be awful, 2026 will be slightly better, 2027 will show improvement, and 2028 will involve rebuilding. Brandon was prevented from seeing beyond 2028, only observing clouds and glory in the spirit realm.

APRIL SOLAR ECLIPSE AND POLITICAL FIGURES: Brandon recounts a vision of the April 2024 solar eclipse, describing a vicious electrical storm with fierce lightning occurring directly in front of the eclipse. The eclipse itself displayed colors of gold, red, and yellow, though the intense storm obscured it. Finally, Brandon notes the sudden disappearance of certain political figures from these visions over the past month, explicitly stating that Gavin, Michelle, and Kari Lake are no longer visible, while Joe Biden was seen in a previous vision but without a clear face.
rawData: [December 16, 2023]-[What the Lord showed me in prayer about 2024 – pt2]-[https://youtu.be/Y_uOjXCZkwE]-[Hey, good morning family. I'm excited to be with y'all again today. I have a part two of the video that I did yesterday or two days ago, whenever I'm releasing this. I'm going to tell you the political stuff about what I saw for 2024. Like I said, I'm a prophetic intercessor, and the Lord shows me things to pray about. I pray for the nation, the economy, and people's healings—everything that's on His heart for that day. He will show me things to come; He does it all the time. This is my life and this is what I do. I'm praying over 2024 right now, and I pray at this time every single year. This is my prayer topic; I start praying for the next year. These are the things that He's showed me so far. I'm sure I will get a lot more; it usually happens. This is what the Lord has showed me so far. I want to say this: I am not saying that this person will be the president of the United States because the Lord did not say that. I'm just telling you what I saw, and I'm not going to add to or take away from anything. I saw Michigan, Minnesota, and Ohio. All of a sudden, I saw people in red with white letters across their hats and shirts, but it was shiny. These shirts were shiny red, and it had MAGA written across it in big white letters. Between each letter was a star from the United States flag, that kind of star. I did not know what it was at first because I did not see the white letters until the Lord let me focus on it in the vision. When I was praying, I could see what the Lord was showing me was MAGA. It was on these shiny red things, and I could see it building. It was like waves; it was moving like when you're in a stadium and you see the Red Wave. It was like that, but it was growing over this area: Michigan, Detroit—all that up there. It was all starting to come together, and then all of a sudden, it started moving south to Iowa, Nebraska, and Kansas. Whenever it got to Oklahoma, I saw what looked like transparent embers. They were all over Oklahoma, but they looked like they were on fire, like embers that were on fire—embers like sap from maple trees. It looked like that, but you could see it was transparent over Oklahoma. These little red MAGA things turned into embers—help me, Holy Ghost—almost like candy. I don't know how else to say it, but it was all over, and then they caught fire. All those became like they were on fire, and I saw torches over this area. It was just over Oklahoma, which I thought was interesting. It went down into Texas a little bit, but it didn't cover it very much, just the North Dallas-Fort Worth area. I had a list of all the states that I saw turn red. I saw five states where I believe there was trouble. I saw Oregon, Washington, and California were instantaneously blue. Then I saw Hawaii blue, Alaska red, and I saw trouble in Arizona. This is what's interesting: Arizona turned blue, but there was red on top of the blue. It made it into a different shade of red, like the blue was turning red, a different crimson—a deeper red. I saw trouble there; that's all I can say about it. I saw New Mexico red, Utah red, Wyoming red, Colorado blue, Montana red, and Nevada turned blue. Idaho was red, then Texas went red, and then I saw it spread throughout the South. It was red, but I saw trouble in Georgia. It was like something was going on with Georgia again. Praying over Georgia, there were blue spots, but the main part of it was red, the way the people were voting, because I saw this MAGA. Then all of a sudden, I saw the storm over Donald Trump. Now, I'm going to tell you this: I did not see him as president. You can assume what you want because of the drama that happened in 2020, but I'm not getting into that. I'm just telling you what I saw so you can pray about it. If you believe that's what the Lord's saying, whatever, but I'm not saying he wins or loses. I heard the Spirit of the Lord say this: 'Can't you tell that this is a refiner's fire that he is going through right now? Don't you know that he is being molded in a refiner's fire?' I saw him through all the trials; I saw him going through the pressure on the potter's wheel, being molded, broken down, and humbled. All of a sudden, I saw the Lord Jesus and Donald Trump. I saw him on one knee, bent over with his head down, weeping before the Lord. I saw the Lord Jesus Christ touching Donald Trump's head as if He were anointing him. I saw a glow all around him while he was crying, kneeling before the Lord in a prayer stance like a Tim Tebow. I don't know how else to say it, but that's how he was before the Lord. He had a blue suit on with a white shirt and a red tie. He was praying, the Lord Jesus had His hand on his head, and I saw a glow all around him. I told you what I saw about Canada, America, and Mexico. I saw him trying to fix everything, getting downloads from the Lord like a Solomon. There was divine speaking to him on how to mend and fix everything that was destroyed. I saw tens of millions of people coming from the southern border trying to invade America over the next year. I'm talking about people from all over the world. I literally saw millions of people coming—so many that it was like a sea of people stacked upon each other, trying to come across the border all at once. There was nothing they could do. During this next year, 2024, this was what was happening. I could see that people like George Soros and Klaus Schwab and these other big people thought, 'It's done. There's nothing they can do to salvage America. We've accomplished what we needed to accomplish,' because the dollar was destroyed. Everything was destroyed; I saw fifty cents on the dollar. It was completely a depression. But out of what looked like complete devastation and no repair—like a TKO—I saw divine wisdom coming onto Donald Trump. I saw a glow around him, a Holy Ghost wisdom like Solomon's rising up in him on how to mend and fix things. Over that four-year period, 2025 was awful, 2026 was not as bad, and 2027 was getting better. By 2028, things were building back, though it was nothing compared to what it was. Thank you, Holy Spirit. He wouldn't let me see past that. I saw clouds and the glory in 2027 and 2028. It looked like clouds and thunderstorms growing in the spirit realm when I was praying, but He wouldn't let me look past it. Sometimes the Lord will let you, and sometimes He won't, but this time it was like, 'It's not time for you to see into that.' I was not allowed to look into it spiritually when praying. I saw April of 2024; I saw the eclipse, and behind the eclipse, I saw the darkness going over America. I saw a storm in front of the eclipse, the most vicious storm that I've ever seen in the spirit realm. There was lightning shooting out—an electric storm. The lightning was so fierce and intense that some of the lightning bolts were frozen in time coming out of the cloud covering the eclipse. I don't know what this meant, but it was interesting. Behind the cloud, the eclipse was gold. I could see colors of gold, red, and yellow from the sun and moon. You could see the eclipse happening, but you couldn't really make it out because the storm was so intense in front of it. It was just lightning in front of this eclipse taking place over America in 2024. You can add up what you want about it. I have not seen Gavin or Michelle anymore when I pray. Like I said, I'm a prophetic intercessor; I see these things and I know we can change some things, though some things we can't. I saw him forever up until a month ago, almost every time I prayed. After he had the debate with Ron DeSantis, I haven't seen him anymore. I'm just being real with y'all. I haven't seen Michelle again. I saw Biden in my last video when I was praying. I don't know what happened to these people or if they're still going to be around; all I know is I don't see their faces. The Lord showed me this: they're trying—this is going to try to be the Democratic person. I haven't seen Kari Lake anymore. I saw her for a while, and it's really strange, but it's just what the Lord shows me. I don't have control of the gift, He does, and He tells me what I'm praying about. This is the first time I've ever seen Trump in a long time, even since the beginning of 2020 when He told me he wasn't going to win last time. He said, 'This is not going to happen. They're going to steal, and this is going to happen with the election; it's fraudulent.' He warned me about all this stuff. Now He's telling me—and I have these things when I'm praying over 2024—He shows me the red. I saw the MAGA, and I saw all the stuff I'm telling you about. Now I see him on a knee praying; I saw the Lord touching his head. I hadn't seen any of that, so I thought he was done and out of the picture. As I said, I see in part and I hear in part. Who knows if he's going to be the winner of all of it, but from what I saw, it looks pretty promising. I'm not going to get into it and say, 'Well, for sure, that's what God said,' because God didn't say that. He told me to pray for this, and I saw a glimpse of something, so you all can pray with me. I hope this blessed you, because a lot of people will be excited about it, and some people won't. I don't care; I'm just telling you what I saw. That's what I have for you today. I hope you do with it what you want. I'm going to pray for you all. Father, I thank You for every single person represented here today. I plead the blood of Jesus Christ over every single person. I thank You, Father, that they have the mind of Christ according to 2 Timothy 1:7. God has not given them a spirit of fear, but of power, of love, and of a well-balanced mind. They can do all things through Christ who strengthens them. I thank You, Lord, for supernatural increase over their house and over their finances. We thank You, Lord, for their finances, that You are able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that they dare ask or think, according to the power that worketh through them. I thank You, Lord, that they have creative ideas to get wealth today. I thank You for supernatural ability to get wealth. I plead the blood of Jesus Christ over their finances. I thank You, Lord, that they do not struggle. I thank You that they're the head and not the tail, above and not beneath. I thank You for good days ahead of them in 2024. They will hear You and they will have more to be able to do whatever You tell them to do for what's coming. I thank You, Father, that maybe we could turn around 2025, but Father, I know what You showed me so many times about 2025. I thank You, Lord, that we would hear Your voice, and a stranger's voice we will not follow. I thank You, Father, that we hear You and that we will not be tormented by satanic or demonic forces. I plead the blood over every single one of these people from the top of their head to the soles of their feet, that no calamity comes nigh them. I thank You, Lord, that the angels would bear them up in their hands, lest they dash their foot against a stone. I thank You, Father, that their marriages are restored and strong. I pray for every single person represented here that if they have a marriage in need of restoration, I pray peace over that marriage and home. I call their children blessed. I thank You, Father, that their children are on fire for Jesus. For every single one represented here, their children are turning back to You if they're wayward. I thank You, Father, that the husbands or wives are turning back to You. I pray for restoration in all homes, Father, that they would train their children up in the way they should go, and when they get older, they will not depart from it. I thank You, Father, for healing in their bodies; no cancers, nothing comes nigh them. Healing, wholeness, and wellness from the top of their head to the soles of their feet; they're healed, whole, and well in the name of Jesus. We thank You, Lord, that they're delivered from sickness and disease. Father, I thank You, Lord, that You became a curse for us so that we don't have to have it, that by the stripes of Jesus, we are healed, whole, and well in the name of Jesus. I thank You, Father, for peace that passes all understanding during this holiday season, this beautiful Christmas season that You've given us. Father, we acknowledge You and give You all the glory, honor, and praise. We take authority over depression people might be battling during the holiday season. Father, I thank You, Lord, that no depression comes nigh them; they are delivered from depression and the holiday blues. Father, I thank You, Lord, that the joy of the Lord is their strength. They have joy rising up on the inside of them. They're praying and seeking, Lord, that You give us a garment of praise for a spirit of heaviness. I thank You, Lord, they will learn to praise and worship. Father, I thank You, Lord, that You inhabit the praises of Your people and that You give them a spirit of joy inside of their hearts. Father, You said, 'Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you.' I thank You, Lord, for that peace over them today. You are the Prince of Peace. Shalom, shalom in your life in Jesus' name. I just want to say thank you. If you could please click that notification bell and click a thumbs up for me. If you could be a part of my community here by subscribing, please subscribe and do all the things that would help me. Every single time you help me via the comment section, you are putting the gospel throughout the whole world; literally, we are getting people saved throughout the whole world and touched by the power of God. I just want to say thank you because without you all, this would not happen. Please help me by doing that. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and we love you. We will see you next time, y'all. Bye-bye.]
